title: lastrea serra
intro: Lastrea serra, also known as the serrated fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea serra lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of consuming Lastrea serra include improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems like diarrhea and ulcers. In herbal preparations, Lastrea serra is often used as a decoction or infusion to create teas and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
